_comment: Gear rating rules. Edit and restart the server to apply changes.
_usage: Band labels used in 'bands', 'fallback_band', and 'matrix' must all match each other.

bands.label: current
bands.description: Within 4 levels of the expansion cap (e.g. 66–70 on a 70-cap server)

bands.label: recent
bands.description: Within 5–9 levels of the expansion cap (e.g. 61–65 on a 70-cap server)

_fallback_note: Any item below the last band above is treated as 'outdated'

tier_groups._note: Informational only — describes what items fall into each tier key used in 'matrix'.
tier_groups.treasured: Treasured, Uncommon, Handcrafted, and Common items

_matrix_note: Grade awarded per quality tier × level band. Rows = tier groups, columns = band labels defined above.
_grade_scores_note: Numeric weight per letter grade, used to compute the average score (0–10 scale).
_raid_ready_note: Minimum average score required for the Raid Ready indicator. 5.5 corresponds to a C+ grade.
